dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7285 IH: Bulletproof Law Enforcement Vehicles Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Tony Gonzales of Texas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Homeland Security

form.official-title: To amend the Homeland Security Act of 2002 to authorize the use of certain financial assistance for vehicle security enhancement upgrades, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Bulletproof Law Enforcement Vehicles Act.
Section 432 of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 (6 U.S.C. 240) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsection (e) as subsection (f); and
by inserting after subsection (d) the following new subsection:

subsection.text: The Secretary shall authorize the use of financial assistance under subsection (d)(2) for vehicle security enhancement upgrades, including for bulletproof windows.
